tasks.title: Client onboarding and ID verification
tasks.description: Verify client identity documents and complete anti-money laundering checks.
tasks.notes: Passport and utility bill verified. AML check passed.

tasks.title: Request and review mortgage offer
tasks.description: Obtain formal mortgage offer from Nationwide and review terms and conditions.
tasks.notes: Mortgage offer received 01/10. Terms reviewed and acceptable. Offer valid until 12/03/2025.

tasks.title: Order local authority searches
tasks.description: Submit local authority search applications to Bristol City Council including local land charges, CON29R, and optional CON29O.
tasks.notes: Searches returned. No adverse entries on local land charges. Planning application noted for neighbouring property (extension), not material.

tasks.title: Order environmental search
tasks.description: Order environmental risk assessment covering flood risk, contaminated land, and ground stability.
tasks.notes: Low risk across all categories. No further action required.

tasks.title: Order water and drainage search
tasks.description: Search with Wessex Water to confirm the property is connected to mains water and public sewers.
tasks.notes: Property connected to mains water and public sewer. No public sewers running through the property.

tasks.title: Review title documents
tasks.description: Examine official copies of the title register and title plan from Land Registry. Check for restrictions, covenants, and easements.
tasks.notes: AI analysis completed 18/09. Conveyancer reviewed and confirmed 25/09. Title is clean. Standard restrictive covenants from original estate development (1987). Right of way over rear access lane noted and acceptable. No charges registered.

tasks.title: Review draft contract pack
tasks.description: Review the draft contract, property information forms (TA6, TA7, TA10), fixtures and fittings list, and supporting documents provided by the seller's solicitor.
tasks.notes: Contract pack reviewed. Several items flagged for additional enquiries. See TASK-008.

tasks.title: Raise and resolve pre-contract enquiries
tasks.description: Raise enquiries with the seller's solicitor on matters arising from the contract pack review, title review, and search results. Chase and review replies.
tasks.notes: AI drafted 15 enquiries on 05/10 based on title, contract, and search analysis. Conveyancer reviewed and amended 2 enquiries on 07/10. Sent to seller's solicitor 07/10. First batch of replies received 28/10 (11 resolved). Second batch received 06/12 resolving boundary and boiler matters. 2 enquiries remain outstanding: (1) Japanese knotweed management plan for neighbouring land, (2) confirmation of building regs sign-off for 2019 loft conversion.

tasks.title: Report on title to mortgage lender
tasks.description: Prepare and submit the Certificate of Title to Nationwide Building Society confirming the property is acceptable security for the mortgage.
tasks.blocked_reason: Cannot report on title until all pre-contract enquiries are resolved (TASK-008).
tasks.notes: Awaiting resolution of outstanding enquiries before we can certify title to the lender.

tasks.title: Approve contract and arrange signing
tasks.description: Send approved contract to client for review and signature. Confirm client is happy with all terms before exchange.

tasks.title: Request deposit funds from client
tasks.description: Confirm deposit amount and request transfer of funds to our client account ahead of exchange.

tasks.title: Exchange contracts
tasks.description: Exchange contracts with the seller's solicitor by telephone, confirming the completion date. Both parties are legally bound after this point.

tasks.title: Request mortgage funds from lender
tasks.description: Submit mortgage drawdown request to Nationwide for release of funds ahead of completion.

tasks.title: Prepare completion statement
tasks.description: Prepare a detailed financial statement showing all monies due on completion: purchase price, fees, disbursements, and amounts already held.

tasks.title: Complete purchase
tasks.description: Transfer completion monies to seller's solicitor. Once confirmed received, the keys are released and the property is legally transferred.

tasks.title: Submit stamp duty return and payment
tasks.description: File the SDLT return with HMRC and arrange payment of stamp duty within 14 days of completion.

tasks.title: Register title with Land Registry
tasks.description: Submit application to Land Registry to register the transfer of ownership and the new mortgage.
